description.en: Reschedule an existing Cal.com booking to a new time slot.
description.de: Eine bestehende Cal.com-Buchung auf einen neuen Zeitslot verschieben.

vars.API_KEY: env:CAL_COM_API_KEY|Get your API key from Cal.com Settings > Developer > API Keys at https://app.cal.com/settings/developer/api-keys

inputs.name: Booking UID

description.en: The unique identifier of the booking to reschedule.
description.de: Die eindeutige Kennung der zu verschiebenden Buchung.

inputs.bot: The unique identifier (UID) of the booking to reschedule. Get this from the list bookings warp.

inputs.name: New Start Time

description.en: New start time in ISO 8601 UTC format (e.g., '2024-08-13T10:00:00Z').

inputs.bot: The new start time for the booking in ISO 8601 UTC format, e.g. '2024-08-13T10:00:00Z'. Must be an available slot.

inputs.name: Reschedule Reason

description.en: Optional reason for rescheduling the booking.
description.de: Optionaler Grund für die Verschiebung der Buchung.

inputs.bot: An optional reason explaining why the booking is being rescheduled.

success.en: Booking rescheduled successfully! New booking ID: {{BOOKING_UID}}
